    class 
    BlueHydrogenPlantBuilder
    Builder for a blue-hydrogen plant template based on SMR, shift conversion, PSA, and CO2 export.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder
    SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder.setFeedTemperature(double feedTemperatureK)
    Sets feed temperature.
    SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder
    SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder.setFuelToFeedMethaneRatio(double fuelToFeedMethaneRatio)
    Sets fuel methane fraction relative to process methane feed.
    SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder
    SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder.setIncludePsa(boolean includePsa)
    Sets whether PSA purification is included.
    SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder
    SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder.setMethaneFeedMolePerSec(double methaneFeedMolePerSec)
    Sets methane feed rate.
    SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder
    SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder.setName(String name)
    Sets plant name.
    SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder
    SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder.setPressure(double pressureBara)
    Sets plant pressure.
    SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder
    SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder.setPsaConfiguration(PSACascade.CascadeConfiguration configuration)
    Sets PSA cascade configuration.
    SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder
    SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder.setPsaPerBedRecoveryTarget(double psaPerBedRecoveryTarget)
    Sets the PSA per-bed recovery target.
    SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder
    SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder.setReformingTemperature(double reformingTemperatureK)
    Sets reformer outlet temperature.
    SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder

    Sets steam-to-carbon ratio.
